'''Siolle Tinta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|woman]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], the daughter of the owner of [[Tinta Lines]]. Once she was the subject of a kidnapping threat, and was placed under the protection of [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] agents [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]]. While Wessiri tracked down and apprehended the would-be kidnapper, Horn stayed hidden with Siolle, and the two shared a brief romance that bloomed when they realized they had the same tastes in art. However, they both recognized that a relationship wouldn't work, and so parted ways soon after.

Siolle enjoyed going to spas on [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]] and art exhibits on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
